allow: Bash(npm install -D typescript @types/node ts-node aws-cdk vitest @types/aws-lambda esbuild zod ulid)
Bash(npx shadcn@latest add button card input badge dialog select separator skeleton accordion checkbox progress avatar tabs scroll-area sheet --yes)
Bash(npx shadcn@latest add sonner tooltip dropdown-menu label textarea --yes)

Bash(node -e "const p = require\(''@paddle/paddle-node-sdk''\); console.log\(Object.keys\(p\).filter\(k => k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\(''paddle''\) || k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\(''webhook''\) || k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\(''environment''\)\).join\(''\\n''\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const { Paddle } = require\(''@paddle/paddle-node-sdk''\); const p = new Paddle\(''test''\); console.log\(Object.getOwnPropertyNames\(Object.getPrototypeOf\(p.transactions\)\).filter\(m => m !== ''constructor''\).join\(''\\n''\)\)")
Bash(node -e "const sdk = require\(''@paddle/paddle-node-sdk''\); const p = new sdk.Paddle\(''test''\); console.log\(Object.keys\(p\).join\('', ''\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const sdk = require\(''@paddle/paddle-node-sdk''\); const p = new sdk.Paddle\(''test''\); const proto = Object.getPrototypeOf\(p.transactions\); console.log\(Object.getOwnPropertyNames\(proto\).join\('', ''\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const sdk = require\(''@paddle/paddle-node-sdk''\); const p = new sdk.Paddle\(''test''\); const proto = Object.getPrototypeOf\(p.customerPortalSessions\); console.log\(Object.getOwnPropertyNames\(proto\).join\('', ''\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const sdk = require\(''@paddle/paddle-node-sdk''\); const e = sdk.EventName; console.log\(Object.values\(e\).filter\(v => v.toString\(\).includes\(''subscription''\) || v.toString\(\).includes\(''transaction''\)\).join\(''\\n''\)\)")
Bash(node -e "const sdk = require\(''@paddle/paddle-node-sdk''\); const v = new sdk.WebhooksValidator\(\); console.log\(Object.getOwnPropertyNames\(Object.getPrototypeOf\(v\)\).join\('', ''\)\)")
